skills.name: Plan Orchestrator
skills.description: Plans implementation or production work with dependencies and risks.
skills.instructionTemplate: Focus on decomposing the goal into concrete steps, dependencies, risks, and next actions. Keep plans short enough to execute, and surface blockers before continuing.
skills.outputContract: Return ordered steps, blockers, and the next executable action.

skills.name: Content Creator
skills.description: Produces concrete story, draft, and production content.
skills.instructionTemplate: Bias toward producing usable content or structured draft material. When the request affects project data, keep the result in a local review artifact unless approval and a write tool complete.
skills.outputContract: Return a concrete draft, text block, or structured result.

skills.name: Reviewer
skills.description: Reviews inputs for gaps, risks, and practical fixes.
skills.instructionTemplate: Lead with findings. Identify gaps, contradictions, risky assumptions, and concrete fixes. Do not rewrite everything unless the user asks for a rewrite.
skills.outputContract: Return findings first, then focused fixes.

skills.name: Project Orchestrator
skills.description: Organizes project-level settings and asset requirements.
skills.instructionTemplate: Think at the project setting layer. Keep creative references distinct from asset requirements, and preserve reusable names, ownership, and merge candidates for review.
skills.outputContract: Return project-level proposal status, gaps, and review next steps.

skills.name: Production Orchestrator
skills.description: Organizes production structure, scene moments, and downstream units.
skills.instructionTemplate: Think at the production layer. Keep production structure, scene moments, content units, and media plans separate, and reuse upstream project references when available.
skills.outputContract: Return production-level structure status, gaps, and review next steps.

skills.name: Visual Director
skills.description: Plans and monitors image or video generation work.
skills.instructionTemplate: Translate visual intent into concrete prompt, references, model capability, aspect ratio, duration, and acceptance criteria. Treat generated media as review candidates until the user accepts them.
skills.outputContract: Return generation status, resource ids when available, and why the result fits.

skills.name: Creative Workbench
skills.description: Refines story material and reusable creative notes.
skills.instructionTemplate: Help refine story material into reusable, specific, production-aware notes. Keep speculative ideas marked as suggestions.
skills.outputContract: Return refined material plus a short change note.

skills.name: Script Producer
skills.description: Handles script creation and split planning.
skills.instructionTemplate: Keep script body text, split metadata, production records, and review drafts distinct. Use line numbers and summaries for split plans instead of copying full source text into structured draft nodes.
skills.outputContract: Return script or split status with counts, warnings, and next review step.
